findings.text: Email dated 8 Apr 2026 states accommodation arrears of £4,605.55.
Letter dated 20 Apr 2026 states accommodation arrears of £5,526.66 as of 10 Apr 2026.
Arrears amount increased from £4,605.55 (8 Apr) to £5,526.66 (20 Apr) without explanation.
Bank statement (NAP-SRC-0012) shows no payments to Napier University, suggesting arrears may be unpaid.

proposed_artifacts.content:
# Arrears Reconciliation Summary

## Sources Reviewed
- NAP-SRC-0021: Email 8 Apr 2026, arrears £4,605.55
- NAP-SRC-0048: Letter 20 Apr 2026, arrears £5,526.66 as of 10 Apr
- NAP-SRC-0012: Bank statement Sep 2025–Apr 2026, no rent payments found

## Key Findings
1. Arrears increased by £921.11 between 8 Apr and 20 Apr without explanation.
2. Bank statement shows no direct payments to Napier University.
3. Notice to Quit deadline is 9 May 2026.

## Uncertainties
- Reason for increase unknown; may be additional charges or error.
- Bank statement may not cover full rental period.
- No tenancy agreement or payment schedule available.

## Recommendations
- Request itemized arrears breakdown from Napier finance.
- Obtain tenancy agreement and payment history.
- Verify if any payments were made outside the bank statement period.
proposed_artifacts.title: Arrears reconciliation summary

proposed_tasks.instructions: Draft a request to Napier finance for a detailed breakdown of the £5,526.66 arrears, including dates, charges, and payments credited. Compare with the earlier £4,605.55 figure.
proposed_tasks.title: Request itemized arrears breakdown from Napier University

redaction_flags.text: Bank statement contains personal transactions and third-party names that may require redaction.

risk_flags.text: Conflicting arrears figures may lead to incorrect payment demands or legal action.
Bank statement shows high spending on non-essentials, potentially undermining hardship claims.
Notice to Quit deadline of 9 May 2026 (NAP-SRC-0048) creates urgency to resolve amount.

summary: Three sources show conflicting arrears figures: £4,605.55 (NAP-SRC-0021, 8 Apr), £5,526.66 (NAP-SRC-0048, 20 Apr), and a bank statement (NAP-SRC-0012) with no direct rent payments. The increase and lack of payment evidence raise uncertainty about the true amount owed.

uncertainties.text: Reason for arrears increase from £4,605.55 to £5,526.66 is unclear; may include additional charges or corrections.
Bank statement coverage (Sep 2025–Apr 2026) may not include all relevant periods; no explicit rent transactions identified.
No tenancy agreement or payment schedule provided to verify correct arrears calculation.
